featureName: BUG-025-004: Test trigger probe quality residuals (DoD-Gherkin fidelity, scenario-manifest drift, test function typo)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-025-004 6-artifact packet for three artifact-quality residuals surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 19 (mode: test-to-doc) trigger probe on spec 025. Findings: G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity gaps for SCN-025-05 and SCN-025-14; 13 stale scenario-manifest.json linkedTests entries (12 unique renames + 1 file-move) across 11 scenarios; test function name typo TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFlailed in internal/pipeline/synthesis_subscriber_test.go line 103. Confirmed none of the residuals are covered by closed BUG-025-001/002/003. No runtime path is changed; parent 025 stays done.

Applied all three scopes. Scope 1: renamed TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFlailed -> TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFailed at internal/pipeline/synthesis_subscriber_test.go line 103 (header only; body untouched). Scope 2: refreshed 13 linkedTests strings and SCN-025-21 file path in specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scenario-manifest.json via 13 multi_replace patches. Scope 3: added 2 evidence-cited DoD items to specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scopes.md (Scope 2 -> SCN-025-05 fidelity, Scope 5 -> SCN-025-14 fidelity). No source-code behavior changed.

Targeted Go test via repo CLI ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFailed exits 0 (internal/pipeline 0.029s). Python unit suite via ./smackerel.sh test unit --python exits 0 (450 passed in 15.65s). grep -rn 'Flailed' --include='*.go' . returns zero matches repo-wide. Python linkedTests cross-check reports TOTAL_MISSING=0.

Traceability guard for specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer exits 0 with RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings) and DoD fidelity 23/23 mapped, 0 unmapped. All 3 bug scopes promoted Not Started -> Done with checked DoD evidence.

Artifact lint for specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer exits 0 (Artifact lint PASSED). Artifact lint for the bug folder exits 0 after Completion Statement + Test Evidence sections added and repo-CLI wrapper commands recorded.

Completion Statement added to report.md. Parent spec 025 state.json updated with BUG-025-004 in resolvedBugs. Single path-limited commit stages only this bug folder, the targeted test rename, the scenario manifest refresh, the spec 025 scopes.md DoD additions, and the parent state.json update. 055 WIP files explicitly excluded.
